ountyId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"string","name":"answer","type":"string"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"salt","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"revealAnswer","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"bountyId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"commitment","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"submitCommitment","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"bountyId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bytes","name":"encryptedAnswer","type":"bytes"},{"internalType":"string","name":"answerHash","type":"string"}],"name":"submitEncryptedAnswer","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{"judgeAll(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"For encrypted bounties, llmInput must pack encrypted answers      into encryptedSecrets with template placeholders in the prompt.      The TEE executor decrypts inside the enclave and substitutes."},"revealAnswer(uint256,string,bytes32)":{"details":"Verifies keccak256(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId) == commitment"},"submitCommitment(uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"commitment = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId))"}},"title":"BountyJudge \u2014 Commit-Reveal + Encrypted Submissions \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 REQUIRED TRACK: COMMIT-REVEAL BOUNTY \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 Participants submit only a commitment hash during the submission phase. After the deadline, they reveal their answer + salt. The contract verifies keccak256(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId) matches the commitment. Only valid, revealed answers are eligible. Flow:   1. Owner \u2192 createBounty(title, rubric, deadline) + reward   2. Participant \u2192 submitCommitment(bountyId, commitment)   3. After deadline \u2192 revealAnswer(bountyId, answer, salt)   4. Owner \u2192 judgeAll(bountyId, llmInput)   5. Owner \u2192 finalizeWinner(bountyId, winnerIndex) \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 ADVANCED TRACK: RITUAL-NATIVE HIDDEN SUBMISSIONS \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 Answers are ECIES-encrypted to the TEE executor's public key and stored as opaque bytes. During judgeAll, encrypted answers are passed via the LLM precompile's encryptedSecrets mechanism. Inside the TEE, the executor decrypts all answers and the LLM judges them in a single batch call. Plaintext answers NEVER exist on-chain.","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"computeCommitmentHash(string,bytes32,address,uint256)":{"notice":"View helper to compute the commitment judgeAll(uint256,bytes).details: For encrypted bounties, llmInput must pack encrypted answers      into encryptedSecrets with template placeholders in the prompt.      The TEE executor decrypts inside the enclave and substitutes.

revealAnswer(uint256,string,bytes32).details: Verifies keccak256(answer, salt, msg.sender, bountyId) == commitment

computeCommitmentHash(string,bytes32,add.notice: View helper to compute the commitment hash

finalizeWinner(uint256,uint256).notice: Finalize the winner and send the reward

getBounty(uint256).notice: Get bounty summary (compatible with original AIJudge interface)

getCommitment(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a commitment (view — never reveals answer)

judgeAll(uint256,bytes).notice: Judge all submissions via the Ritual LLM precompile

revealAnswer(uint256,string,bytes32).notice: Phase 2: Reveal answer + salt to verify the commitment

submitEncryptedAnswer(uint256,bytes,stri.notice: Submit an ECIES-encrypted answer (decryptable only inside TEE)
